name: /prompt-promote: rejects when version's eval_pass_rate is lower than the currently-active version's (regression gate)
command:
mkdir -p prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer prompts/registry && printf '- id: rsc-reviewer
  versions:
    - {version: 2.0.0, file: prompts/rsc-reviewer/v2.0.0.md, hash: sha256:S, created: 2026-05-12T00:00:00Z, eval_pass_rate: 0.95, regression_from_prior: 0, status: active}
' > prompts/registry.yaml && printf '{"version":"2.1.0","eval_pass_rate":0.85,"records":[]}' > prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer/2.1.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-promote.sh" rsc-reviewer 2.1.0
